faq.question: Can I drive in Montenegro with my foreign licence?
faq.question_de: Kann ich in Crna Gora mit meinem ausländischen Führerschein fahren?
faq.answer: Many visitors can drive with a valid national licence for short stays, but rental companies and police may require an International Driving Permit (IDP). Always confirm before you travel.
faq.answer_de: Viele Besucher dürfen mit gültigem nationalen Führerschein kurzzeitig fahren, Mietwagenfirmen und Polizei verlangen aber oft einen Internationalen Führerschein (IDP). Vor der Reise klären.

faq.question: What are the default speed limits in Montenegro?
faq.question_de: Welche Standard-Tempolimits gelten in Crna Gora?
faq.answer: Default limits depend on road type, but posted signs always override general defaults. Check urban, rural, and motorway limits on the country guide above.
faq.answer_de: Standardlimits hängen vom Straßentyp ab, ausgeschilderte Limits haben immer Vorrang. Urban-, Land- und Autobahn-Limits findest du oben im Länderguide.

faq.question: Where can I verify the latest rules for Montenegro?
faq.question_de: Wo kann ich die aktuellen Regeln für Crna Gora prüfen?
faq.answer: Use the official sources listed on this site and re-check with government transport or police authorities before driving.
faq.answer_de: Nutze die offiziellen Quellen auf dieser Seite und prüfe vor der Fahrt erneut bei Behörden für Verkehr oder Polizei.

summary: Coastal roads are scenic but narrow; mountain passes need care.

alcohol_limit.notes: Lower limits may apply to novice or professional drivers.

rules.child_seat_rules: Approved child restraint required for children below local height/age limits.
rules.phone_usage_rules: Handheld phone use while driving is prohibited.
rules.headlights_rules: Use headlights at night, in tunnels, and in poor visibility.
rules.priority_rules: Follow posted signs and local right-of-way rules at intersections.
rules.parking_rules: Check local parking signs and paid zones in cities.
rules.winter_rules: Winter tyres or chains may be required in mountain or snow regions when signed.
